falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate sustained bullish momentum contradicting the blowoff pattern's expected bearish reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume declines by 30% below the 50-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Significantly reduced volume would invalidate the blowoff scenario, which typically requires high volatility and participation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Formation of a confirmed bullish engulfing candlestick pattern on the daily chart
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This pattern signals a reversal from a potential bearish blowoff to a bullish trend, directly contradicting the current unknown verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
